content: @noble/ciphers hsalsa(s,k,i,out) takes Uint32Array args (4=sigma, 8=key, 4=nonce, 8=out); must copy DH bytes to fresh aligned Uint8Array and use u32() from @noble/ciphers/utils before calling. secretbox(key,nonce) returns {seal,open} alias. xsalsa20poly1305(key,nonce) returns {encrypt,decrypt}.

name: nacl-box-with-noble
description: x25519.getSharedSecret + hsalsa(SIGMA, u32(alignedDh), zeros4, out8) + xsalsa20poly1305 replaces tweetnacl box. Both sides must use same format (ciphertext||MAC appended).

content: vitest resolve aliases: studio-plugins, studio-transport, studio-ui vitest.config.ts require @bt-studio/core alias; studio-ui also needs studio-common and studio-plugins aliases
browser use-repl.ts base64urlDecode must throw on length%4===1 (invalid base64url), not silently add '===' padding; matches server repl-crypto.ts behavior

getRandomValues 65536-byte quota: Web Crypto API getRandomValues() rejects calls requesting more than 65536 bytes. For large-payload tests, use Uint8Array.map((_, i) => i % 256) instead of getRandomBytes(N) when N > 65536.

name: extractCompletableFragment
description: Walk backwards from cursor end to extract rightmost identifier/dot chain before resolving completions; strips function args, operators, commas. Fixes 'doSomething(myObj.' nested context.
